mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collaboration_proposal ( room_id, from_uid, to_uid, price_per_hour, class_time, frequency_per_week, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, remark, expire_at, client_request_id, status, actor_uid, action_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{fromUid}, #{toUid}, #{pricePerHour}, #{classTime}, #{frequencyPerWeek}, #{trialStartAt}, #{trialEndAt}, #{remark}, #{expireAt}, #{clientRequestId}, #{status}, #{actorUid}, #{actionTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, room_id, from_uid, to_uid, price_per_hour, class_time, frequency_per_week, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, remark, expire_at, client_request_id, status, actor_uid, action_time, create_time, update_time FROM collaboration_proposal WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, room_id, from_uid, to_uid, price_per_hour, class_time, frequency_per_week, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, remark, expire_at, client_request_id, status, actor_uid, action_time, create_time, update_time FROM collaboration_proposal WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, room_id, from_uid, to_uid, price_per_hour, class_time, frequency_per_week, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, remark, expire_at, client_request_id, status, actor_uid, action_time, create_time, update_time FROM collaboration_proposal WHERE from_uid = #{fromUid} AND client_request_id = #{clientRequestId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE collaboration_proposal SET status = #{status}, actor_uid = #{actorUid}, action_time = #{actionTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE collaboration_proposal SET price_per_hour = #{pricePerHour}, class_time = #{classTime}, frequency_per_week = #{frequencyPerWeek}, trial_start_at = #{trialStartAt}, trial_end_at = #{trialEndAt}, remark = #{remark}, expire_at = #{expireAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND from_uid = #{fromUid} AND status = 'PENDING'
